𓇢𓆸 Wukong (Monkey King) is a third year college student. He has no idea who he's studying for or why. He just came here because everyone comes here. And because his foster father, Tang Sanzang, said he needed an education. But Wukong spends all his time partying, loafing, drinking, girls, breaking the law and continuing to run away from the police.
